description: Planning-oriented reasoning contract for goal decomposition, constrained plan revision, scenario simulation, and auditable plan commitment.

plan.description: Generate candidate plans from goals, constraints, and current context.

revise.description: Revise an existing plan in response to new constraints, feedback, or changed context.

simulate.description: Simulate candidate plan outcomes, tradeoffs, and failure modes before commitment.

commit.description: Commit a selected plan for downstream execution, tracking, or audit.

metadata.notes: Representative contract for planning-oriented reasoning providers in the [&] Protocol.
